name: File or Folder Permissions Change
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Jakob Weinzettl, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: File or Folder Permissions Change
SIGMA Description: Detects file and folder permission changes.

False positives:
- User interacting with files permissions (normal/daily behaviour).

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=11 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND (LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a0%chmod%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%chown%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY File or Folder Permissions Change on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=11 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND (LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a0%chmod%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%chown%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: File or Folder Permissions Change
